prompt: I'm building a pet store API. Set up the OpenAPI Puer folder structure in a new folder called 'petstore-api' and generate endpoints for managing pets (list, create, get by ID, update, delete) and pet categories (list, create). Include schemas for Pet and Category models.

assertions.text: All 9 required OpenAPI Puer items exist: .openapi-puer/, .openapi-puer/environments.json, components/, components/parameters/, components/responses/, components/requestBodies/, components/schemas/, paths/, api.json
api.json is valid JSON with openapi version 3.1.1, has info.title, info.version, servers array, paths object
paths/pets.json exists with 5 operations: GET /pets, POST /pets, GET /pets/{petId}, PUT /pets/{petId}, DELETE /pets/{petId}
paths/categories.json exists with 2 operations: GET /categories, POST /categories
components/schemas/pet.json exists with a Pet schema under components.schemas
components/schemas/category.json exists with a Category schema under components.schemas
All 4 parameter files exist in components/parameters/: cookie.json, header.json, path.json, query.json
All operationId values in paths files use kebab-case naming
All schema names under components.schemas use PascalCase
Each paths/*.json file is a standalone OpenAPI document with openapi, info, servers, and paths fields
.openapi-puer/environments.json exists with a Default environment entry including id, name, baseUrl, timestamps
README.md exists with folder structure documentation
All JSON files are valid parseable JSON with 2-space indentation
